name: PFIC Start-up Year Exception

eligibility.description: Applies to U.S. shareholders of new foreign corporations that may have high passive income initially (e.g., from seed capital) but will transition to active operations.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A foreign corporation is not treated as a Passive Foreign Investment Company (PFIC) during its first year of gross income if it is established that the corporation will not be a PFIC for the following two years.
